items.description: Must follow PRISMA 2020 checklist for systematic reviews
At least 2 databases (PubMed + 1), reproducible search terms
PRISMA flow diagram with counts at each stage
RoB 2 for RCTs, independently by 2+ reviewers
HR/OR/RR with justification, CI level stated
I², tau², Q-test, interpretation thresholds stated
Funnel plot + formal test (Egger's) for k>=10
Package version, R/Stata/Python with specific packages
Mixed-effects model, REML estimation, moderators pre-specified
Individual study HRs with CIs + pooled diamond
Slope, CI, p-value, R², bubble plot
ARR/NNT if applicable, clinical significance discussed
At least 3 substantive limitations including trial-level data
How to access individual study data / extracted data
